# resetPassword

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the resetPassword mutation

## Usage

```bash
csdk reset-password --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.roleId <value> --input.resetToken <value> --input.newPassword <value>
```

## Examples

### Run resetPassword

```bash
csdk reset-password --input.clientMutationId <value> --input.roleId <value> --input.resetToken <value> --input.newPassword <value>
```
